title: betula glandulosa var. rotundifolia
intro: Betula glandulosa var. rotundifolia, also known as the round-leaved birch or dwarf birch, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Betulaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Betula glandulosa var. rotundifolia include reducing fever, alleviating skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
